chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1308 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No.25 2. For order on CMA No.3165/2023 3. For hearing of main case 02.02.2026 This matter is pending since 2023 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought till date. Diary demonstrates that in the last four years applicant has not endeavored to have the matter listed and / or heard. Even today applicant remains unrepresented without intimation and / or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
